RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0006 Page 4 of 5 Statement of Account — continued Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 21/03/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - - 8,014 13/01/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 720 1,455 8,749 09/04/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 780 1,504 9,473 09/10/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 9,473 27/12/2025 UTILITY BILL 602 - 8,871 22/06/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - 1,244 10,115 03/01/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 120 252 10,247 13/03/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 142 201 10,306 11/07/2025 UTILITY BILL 279 108 10,135 20/05/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 10,135 25/06/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 260 - 9,875 14/05/2025 UTILITY BILL 365 - 9,510 12/06/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - - 9,510 02/03/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - - 9,510 17/09/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 469 9,979 02/04/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 782 346 9,543 28/01/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 828 2,236 10,951 11/02/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 601 - 10,350 Co-signer required
